# Vendored mtDNA report dependency

The standalone CBIcall mtDNA report embeds Tabulator 6.5.0 from the
`tabulator-tables` distribution. Tabulator is released under the MIT license.

- Project: https://tabulator.info/
- Source: https://github.com/olifolkerd/tabulator
- Version: 6.5.0
- License text: `LICENSE.tabulator.txt`
